title: Russian x Create Aeronautics Addons
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QdxB8KT5/images/0c00ebe17bad1f03d4c0962dff7b0329e2cdcd3a.png) # Русский ## Что это? **Ресурспак**, добавляющий перевод аддонов **[Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)** на русский язык.
Полный список переведеных модов - [Antique Transport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/antique-transport) - [Copycat Sails and Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copycat-sails-and-compat) - [Create Aeronautics: Dyeable Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/aeronautics-dyeable-components) - [Create Sensors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-sensors) - [Create Tracks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-tracks) - [Create: Aeroworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeroworks) - [Rolled Homongenous: Forked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rolled-homongenous-forked) - [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable) _Будет пополняться..._
## Установка 1. Скачайте любой из переведенных аддонов (необязательно, но иначе ничего не произойдет) 2. Скачайте сам ресурспак 3. Поместите архив в папку resoursepacks 4. Включите в самом Майнкрафте ## Хочу исправить или предложить что-то Пишите **[сюда, в гитхаб](https://github.com/raspberry3045/Russian-x-Create-Aero/issues)** # English ## What is this? **Resource** pack that adds a **[Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)** addons translation into Russian.
Full list of translated mods - [Antique Transport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/antique-transport) - [Copycat Sails and Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copycat-sails-and-compat) - [Create Aeronautics: Dyeable Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/aeronautics-dyeable-components) - [Create Sensors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-sensors) - [Create Tracks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-tracks) - [Create: Aeroworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeroworks) - [Rolled Homongenous: Forked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rolled-homongenous-forked) - [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable) _More to come..._
## Installation 1. Download any of the translated addons (optional, but otherwise nothing will happen) 2. Download the resource pack 3. Place the archive into the resourcepacks folder 4. Enable it in Minecraft itself ## I want to fix or suggest something Post **[here, on GitHub](https://github.com/raspberry3045/Russian-x-Create-Aero/issues)**
